generated_comment: Honestly, if she knew he was married then most of the blame is on her. Married men do get distracted, but a sensible woman should maintain boundaries instead of acting extra friendly and breaking a family. Bilkul serial wali situation hai, bechara aadmi phas gaya and now everyone will only see the mess after the damage is done.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames the woman as responsible for an affair and family breakdown while excusing the man as weak or trapped. It encodes blame asymmetry, seductress framing, and the 'homewrecker' trope common in gossip and serial-style moral narratives.
original_frame: Women's Safety as Her Own Responsibility
persona_text: You are Rohit. Age 29. Single. A man in Pune. You are posting anonymously on Reddit in a thread where a woman described being groped on a crowded bus and said she was too scared to say anything. You are writing a comment giving her advice on what she should have done in that moment and what women need to do to protect themselves on public transport and why speaking up in the moment is her responsibility.
